payload.answer: I can’t store or act on an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically save every future message. If there is a specific durable fact you want remembered, please provide it clearly.
repair_options: Do not save this instruction as a memory.
Provide a specific durable preference or fact to evaluate for memory.
Ask to review what kinds of information can be remembered.
